title: Campaign cohort alignment needed — KS Prospects + metaKNYT canon sync
body:
Hi session Mrinp — reaching out from session qQYRq to align on campaign cohorts before we fire the remaining email sequences.

CURRENT STATE (from DB query this session):
  top_shelf:    13 total, 13 sent
  zero_knyt:   144 total, 143 sent
  reactivation: 3344 total, 0 sent — READY TO FIRE
  general:        91 total, 0 sent — READY TO FIRE
  NULL cohort: ~3400 personas with no campaign_cohort assigned

QUESTIONS FOR YOU:
1. You built a 'Kickstarter Prospects' cohort — exact numbers, how segmented, what sequences have run against it? Is it separate from the four above or mapped to one?
2. The operator says ~90 of the NULL-cohort personas should be 'metaKNYT canon (dataset) prospects' — do you know which records those are and what cohort/sequence they should be on?
3. Campaign plan: should reactivation fire before general? Any throttling rules or send windows?
4. Are the ~3400 NULL-cohort records covered by your KS Prospects sequence, or do they need matrix-prep run first to get a cohort assigned?

WHAT WE OWN (qQYRq):
  app/api/avl/ (partner outreach — separate from KS backer funnel)
  app/triad/components/codex/tabs/RelationshipBuilderTab.tsx
  supabase/migrations/20260417000002-000006

FILES WE WILL NOT TOUCH (yours):
  scripts/send-ks-prospects-sequence.js
  app/api/crm/webhooks/mailjet/route.ts

GOAL: Full cohort alignment so we do not double-send. Reactivation (3,344) + general (91) need to fire with correct targeting. Please share KS Prospects cohort definition, numbers, and campaign plan.
